traits.locale_text: The creature gains +80% impact damage and rending damage reduction, +3 deflection, +20% armour durability, +25% damage, +25% armour penetration, +25% dodge reduction, and +1 MP.

The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

The creature gains +80% {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}rending damage{/g} reduction, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +20% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} durability, +25% damage, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, and +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

languages.text: Существо получает +80% к снижению {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударного{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}раздирающего урона{/g}, +3 к {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражению{/g}, +20% к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броне{/g}, +25% к наносимому урону, {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитию брони{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}снижению уклонения{/g} и +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g}.

Существо получает +80% к снижению {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударного{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}раздирающего урона{/g}, +3 к {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражению{/g}, +20% к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броне{/g}, +25% к наносимому урону, {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитию брони{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}снижению уклонения{/g} и +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g}.

languages.text: Die Kreatur erhält +80 % {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}Rüstungsbrechender-Schaden{/g}-Reduktion, +3 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g}, +20 % {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g}, +25 % Schaden, +25 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}, +25 % {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}Ausweichen-Reduktion{/g} und +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g}.

languages.text: このクリーチャーは、+80%の{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}衝撃ダメージ{/g}と{g|Encyclopedia:RendingDamage}切り裂きダメージ{/g}軽減、+3の{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}防御{/g}、+20%の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}鎧{/g}、+25%のダメージ、+25%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}鎧貫通{/g}、+25%の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}回避軽減{/g}、+1の{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}を得る。
